who: manufacturing operations manager in a small-scale Etsy seller production facility processing 5–15 products/day
offer: For manufacturing operations managers in a small-scale Etsy seller production facility processing 5–15 products/day, inconsistent product quality causes customer complaints and returns. We provide real-time quality monitoring instead of manual quality checks and sporadic inspections.
problem: Inconsistent product quality leading to customer complaints and returns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for manufacturing operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to manufacturing operations managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try real-time quality alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
